summary: Iteration 8: Service-Dog Training Curriculum full-stack verification. Backend: 19/19 new training tests pass (training_meta, command CRUD, seed of 36 TADSAW commands, dog curriculum GET/PUT, training sessions, highest-wins, CGC mock pass, badge logic, client auth scoping). Regression: 80/81 legacy tests still pass (1 pre-existing failure in test_sprint2 report-card check, unrelated to this sprint). Frontend: Settings → Training Commands tab renders the full seeded library grouped by 4 categories with edit/delete + (+) NEW. Dog edit modal → Training tab renders TrainingProgram with progress ring, 36 command tiles, badges container, Log Session and History buttons. Log Session modal opens with date/environment/distraction/notes/CGC checkbox + 1-5 score buttons per command. Client portal shows Training Progress section per dog (progress ring 22% w/ 8/36 mastered, per-category % chips, Bronze + Engagement Master badges, Print Certificate button, full curriculum expandable). All TADSAW commands, score scale (0-5), category badge rules, and persistence verified end-to-end.
action_items: Optional: Fix the pre-existing test_sprint2.test_report_card_visible_in_portal failure (legacy, not Sprint Training related). The booking does not carry a report_card field in the portal /api/bookings response for that test scenario — may be a fixture/timing issue or a real bug introduced earlier.
Optional: ai-dev-tools is wrapping <option> text in <span>, causing a React hydration console warning on admin booking modal selects (already noted in iteration_7). Not blocking.
critical_code_review_comments: training_data.compute_badges silver-tier threshold check uses basics_pct >= 80 (label says '50% basics in bronze, 80% in silver'). Behavior matches code; ensure spec aligned.

PUT /api/dogs/{dog_id}/training/{command_id} does not validate that command_id actually exists in db.commands. A stale/invalid id will silently be stored. Low priority — UI only passes server-listed ids.

_seed_commands_if_empty runs on every GET /api/commands and GET /api/dogs/{id}/training. Inserts are guarded by count==0, but each request still does an extra count_documents — consider caching the flag in-process for a small perf win.
TrainingProgram badges <div data-testid='badges'> only renders inside the empty-state guard; testers should know it's absent when no badges earned (verified intentional).
test_credentials: Admin: admin@sithappens.com/admin123; Client: testclient@sithappens.com/test1234 (dogs: Rocky, Daisy)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests mutated Daisy's curriculum: Sit=4 (set then preserved via highest-wins), Down=5 (from session log), engagement category fully mastered to trigger Bronze + Engagement Master badges. CGC mock_passed_at set to 2026-01-12 on Daisy. These persist; main agent may want to reset before user demo.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sprint Training endpoints and UI are working. Daisy currently has Bronze badge and Engagement Master from these tests. Test commands prefixed TEST_ are cleaned up. Pre-existing failing test: test_sprint2.test_report_card_visible_in_portal — legacy, predates this sprint.
rca of the issue: N/A — all new feature tests passed first run after correcting the dog-list fixture from /api/clients/{cid}/dogs (404) to /api/dogs (returns caller-scoped list).
